title: ChatGPT
description:
Advanced conversational AI for writing, coding, and research.
Helps with problem-solving, learning, and productivity tasks.

title: Google Gemini
description:
Google’s AI assistant for text, images, and coding.
Integrated with Google services for smart productivity.

title: Midjourney
description:
AI tool for generating high-quality images from text prompts.
Popular among designers and digital artists.

title: DALL·E
description:
AI image generator that creates visuals from text descriptions.
Useful for creative design and concept art.

title: Grammarly
description:
AI writing assistant for grammar, tone, and clarity.
Helps improve emails, essays, and professional writing.

title: Notion AI
description:
AI-powered workspace assistant for notes and documents.
Summarizes content and helps with writing tasks.

title: Runway ML
description:
AI tool for video editing and content generation.
Creates videos, effects, and animations using AI.

title: Copy.ai
description:
AI copywriting tool for marketing and content creation.
Generates ads, blogs, and social media posts quickly.
